text:
M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Wound Infection or Deter This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to wound infection or deterioration. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2400_INTRVTN_SMRY_DPRSN M2400 Intervention Synopsis- Depression Intervent This field indicates, since the previous OASIS assessment, whether the depression intervention was BOTH included in the physician-ordered plan of care AND implemented. 00 = No
01 = Yes
NA = Not
